aronui.when_to_use: Use to modify details of an existing contact when you have the contact_id from list_contacts or get_contact. Requires at least the contact_id; all other fields are optional.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a success message or updated contact data.

pitfalls.text: contact_id is mandatory; if missing, empty, or null, the error is: 'error: contact_id is required for update_contact. Use list_contacts or get_contact to get contact_id.'

procedure: Ensure you have a valid contact_id from list_contacts or get_contact.
If multiple contacts have the same name, ask the user to confirm which one before updating.
Provide contact_id as a non-empty string.
Optionally provide any other fields to update: name, email, whatsapp_phone, telegram_username, preferred_language, how_to_address, birthday, notes, allow_as_assistant_user.
verification: Verify that contact_id is a non-empty string before calling the tool.
Ensure optional fields have correct types: allow_as_assistant_user must be a boolean; other fields should be strings.
After update, confirm the changes by calling get_contact with the same contact_id.
